title: Raw data accompanying research paper "Oxidative stress and antioxidant defenses in experimentally bleached and copper exposed sea anemones (Anemonia viridis)"
author: Chowdhury, Gourab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data accompanying research paper "Oxidative stress and antioxidant defenses in experimentally bleached and copper exposed sea anemones (Anemonia viridis)". Four datasets are presented in Excell formats related to the main figures of the manuscript: (1) production of reactive oxygen species in bleached and unbleache anemones (ROS), (2) algae coverage in bleached and unbleached anemones through image analysis (ImajeJ) on histological sections, (3) qPCR data for four genes and (4) targeted plus non-target metabolomics.
steps_raw: Raw data accompanying research paper "Oxidative stress and antioxidant defenses in experimentally bleached and copper exposed sea anemones (Anemonia viridis)".
